signals.headline: US Regulators Officially Classified SOL and ETH as Commodities in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Regulators Officially Classified SOL and ETH as Commodities in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
This classification, confirmed in March 2026, eliminated major legal uncertainty for allocators, enabling clearer institutional investment paths alongside existing spot ETF approvals (ETH in 2024, SOL in Oct 2025).[1]
